name: Nichols Plant Day Lavender Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Vanilla ice cream, high-quality with real vanilla
1 drop Nichols Northwest Lavender Oil (or use an alternative)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop the vanilla ice cream into a bowl.
2. Add the chopped candied ginger and lavender oil.
3. Mix gently until combined.
4. Transfer to an ice cream maker and churn according to manufacturer's instructions.
5. Once frozen, transfer to a container and refrigerate until ready to serve.
